title: Lizzy Pastel Multi-Purpose Chopping Board | 38cm x 23.5cm | BPA Free Thick Chopping Board, Large Size, Easy Grip Handle, for Kitchen Slicing, Chopping and Cutting (1, Mint)
features: Handy Kitchen Essential: The Pastel Multi-Purpose Chopping Board is a must-have in any kitchen, perfect for slicing, chopping, and cutting a wide variety of ingredients. Its practical design helps streamline food preparation tasks, making it an indispensable tool for both novice cooks and seasoned chefs alike.

Work Surface Protection: This chopping board not only facilitates efficient food preparation but also plays a crucial role in protecting your kitchen surfaces. By providing a sturdy and reliable cutting area, it helps prevent damage to countertops and other work surfaces, ensuring they remain in pristine condition for longer.

Convenient Dimensions: Each board measures 38cm in length and 23.5cm in width, offering ample space for all your chopping needs without taking up too much room on your countertop. The thickness of 0.5cm ensures durability while maintaining a lightweight profile that is easy to handle and store.

Easy to Clean and Lightweight: The chopping board is designed with convenience in mind. It is easy to clean, ensuring that you can maintain a hygienic kitchen environment with minimal effort. Additionally, its lightweight construction makes it easy to move around and handle, reducing the strain on your wrists and hands during use.

Ergonomic Handle Design: Featuring a built-in handle, the chopping board offers enhanced functionality and ease of use. The handle provides a comfortable grip, making it simple to transport the board from your countertop to the sink or stove. It also allows for easy hanging storage, helping to keep your kitchen organized and clutter-free.
